title: Dercksen earns maiden Proteas Women contract
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - In a major career boost,...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - In a major career boost, Six Gun Grill Garden Route Badgers all-rounder Annerie Dercksen has been selected for the Proteas Women contracted squad for the upcoming 2025/26 season.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - In a major career boost, Six Gun Grill Garden Route Badgers all-rounder Annerie Dercksen has been selected for the Proteas Women contracted squad for the upcoming 2025/26 season."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The 23-year-old reigning ICC Emerging Women's Cricketer of the Year was on the list for the Proteas Women squad confirmed by Cricket South Africa (CSA) on Monday 17 March."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She replaces the World Sports Betting Western Province duo of Lara Goodall and Delmi Tucker on the 15-player list.","html":"She replaces the World Sports Betting Western Province duo of Lara Goodall and Delmi Tucker on the 15-player list."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Led by captain Laura","html":"Led by captain Laura"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Wolvaardt and head coach Mandla Mashimbyi, the Proteas Women are gearing up for a significant year ahead.","html":"Wolvaardt and head coach Mandla Mashimbyi, the Proteas Women are gearing up for a significant year ahead."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Their preparations will be focused on the ultimate prize in the ICC Women's Cricket World Cup 2025, set to take place in India later this year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"We are proud to announce the Proteas Women's contracted squad for the 2025/26 season, a group that embodies the depth, talent, and potential of women's cricket in South Africa,\" said CSA Executive: National Teams and High Performance, Enoch Nkwe.","html":"\"We are proud to announce the Proteas Women's contracted squad for the 2025/26 season, a group that embodies the depth, talent, and potential of women's cricket in South Africa,\" said CSA Executive: National Teams and High Performance, Enoch Nkwe."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"It's also a momentous occasion for Annerie Dercksen, whose performances have been impressive as she cemented her spot in the team, earning a well-deserved first national contract.\"","html":"\"It's also a momentous occasion for Annerie Dercksen, whose performances have been impressive as she cemented her spot in the team, earning a well-deserved first national contract.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Dercksen earns maiden Proteas Women contract
